settings.heading: Why Choose A Klawford Divan Bed?

settings.title: 60 Night Risk-Free Trial
settings.description: Our beds are crafted with exceptional quality, and we're sure you'll love your Klawford bed. If you're not completely satisfied within the first 60 nights, simply contact us for a hassle-free return or swap.

settings.title: Extra Storage Option For More Space
settings.description: Make the most of your space with Klawford Divan Beds. Choose from our fantastic range of storage options to keep your bedroom organised and clutter-free.

settings.title: Sustainably Sourced & Handmade in The UK
settings.description: Every Klawford bed is made with the finest components from sustainably sourced materials, ensuring longevity, comfort, and eco-friendly design.

settings.title: Customisable & Beautiful Headboards
settings.description: Every Klawford Divan Bed comes with a stunning headboard designed to complement your bed perfectly. Every headboard is removable — integrate it into your bedroom exactly how you want.

settings.title: Handle Extreme Weight With a Reinforced Base
settings.description: Our divan bed base is built to last and designed for maximum durability with an exceptional weight tolerance able to support all types of sleepers.

settings.heading: Shop Now, Pay Later
settings.subheading: Split the cost of your order into easy monthly instalments with no hidden fees.

settings.title: Up to 12 Monthly Instalments
settings.description: Spread the cost of your order over up to 12 equal monthly payments.

settings.title: Zero Interest Rate
settings.description: Pay absolutely nothing extra — 0% interest for the full term of your plan.

settings.title: No Early Repayment Charges
settings.description: Want to pay it off sooner? No problem — there are no fees when your balance is paid early.

settings.title: Delivered to Your Room
settings.description: Our 2-man delivery team will bring your order straight to your room of choice at no extra charge.

settings.title: Stress-Free Assembly
settings.description: Your free team of experts will assemble your new bed set in as little as 15 minutes so all you have to do is enjoy it.

settings.title: We're Just a Phone Call Away
settings.description: Got questions or need advice? Our sleep specialists are ready to help. Call us at 0800 000 0000 and we'll be happy to assist!

settings.question: Which is right for me first, and what does this mean?
settings.answer: A divan bed is a great choice if you want a sturdy base with optional storage. Ottoman bases offer lift-up storage. Wingback beds feature a tall, padded headboard for a luxurious look. Choose based on your storage needs and style preference.

settings.question: How long does it take to make Klawford beds?
settings.answer: Each Klawford bed is handcrafted in the UK and typically takes 5–10 working days to manufacture before dispatch. Our team works hard to ensure every detail is perfect.

settings.question: Can I change my order?
settings.answer: You can amend your order within 24 hours of placing it by contacting our customer service team. After manufacturing begins we are unable to make changes.

settings.question: Can I choose my delivery date and time?
settings.answer: Yes! Once your order is ready to dispatch, our delivery partner will contact you to arrange a convenient date and time window that works for you.

settings.question: Can I pay monthly or through financing options?
settings.answer: Yes — we offer 0% interest financing through Klarna and Dividebuy. Split your purchase into monthly instalments at checkout with no hidden fees.

settings.question: Where are your products manufactured?
settings.answer: All Klawford products are handcrafted in the United Kingdom using sustainably sourced materials. We're proud to support British manufacturing.

settings.question: Do you count the height the headboard adds to the bed?
settings.answer: The dimensions listed for each product refer to the bed base and mattress only. Headboard height is listed separately in the product dimensions section above.

settings.question: How much credit can I use through financing options?
settings.answer: Credit limits vary depending on your credit assessment. Most customers can finance orders from £250 up to £5,000 through our 0% interest finance partners.
